steps.title: Find the main contrast
steps.content: The text describes jalis as keepers of family histories and important events, then says that although new technologies have changed parts of the role, jalis still protect their peoples' stories. The main idea is about continuity despite change.

steps.title: Avoid narrow details
steps.content: B overemphasizes teaching and adds the unsupported idea that many jalis like it best. C focuses on entertainment, which is not discussed. D focuses on technology replacing some duties, but the passage emphasizes jalis' continued value as preservers of stories. The answer is A.
